programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold becomes a hot (and dangerous) hitter. He keeps injuring people every time he swings the bat. Afraid of hurting more people, Arnold refuses to play ball. / Arnold and Gerald manage the career of the unlikely country-and-western singer, Mr. Hyunh.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold lends Sid his room for one evening, but the arrangement backfires when Sid keeps on borrowing the room. / Helga and Patty (the big girl) face off.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: All the kids are paired with adults with interesting jobs except Arnold, who is forced to spend time with the Jolly Olly Man. / Harold believes it's his life's calling to become a butcher, but he slowly drives Mr. Greene, the butcher, crazy.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Casa Paradiso/Gerald''s Tonsils: Grandpa becomes tired of dealing with the boarding house and decides to sell./Gerald has his tonsils removed before a big concert and must come to grips with the fact that his voice has changed.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Best Man/Cool Party: The Coach wants to remarry Tish and asks Arnold to be his best man./ Rhonda has a party and only invites the cool kids.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Sid''s Revenge/Roller Coaster: After Arnold accidentally embarrasses Sid, Sid seeks revenge./ Eugene wants to ride with the gang, but they all think he''s a jinx and won''t go with him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Grandpa's Birthday/Road Trip: Grandpa thinks he's going to die soon because no one in his family ever made it past his age. He prepares to die, and Arnold tries to convince him that life is still worth living.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga's Show/Flood: Helga does a standup routine at a school function and proceeds to insult all of her friends. They are offended, prompting her to change her act to a more friendly and gentle routine. She performs the new act, but it's boring.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Eugene's Birthday/Stinky's Pumpkin
programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday: Arnold is the cause of two birthday party's for Eugene being a big flop. Stinky's Pumpkin: Stinky feels that he is a failure at everything he does until Arnold helps him discover that he is the best pumpkin grower in town.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips
programme.desc: Dinner for Four: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. Phoebe Skips: Helga is devastated when her patsy, Phoebe, is skipped to the 6th grade.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Full Moon/Student Teacher
programme.desc: Full moon: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it's a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. Student Teacher: Olga comes to PS 118 to be a student teacher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Big Gino/Jamie O in Luv
programme.desc: Big Gino: Sid gets in over his head when doing business with the local kid loan shark, Big Gino. Jamie O in Luv: Gerald's big brother, Jamie O, falls for a girl and suddenly turns nice to his kid brother.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?
programme.desc: Beeper Queen: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. Oscar Can't Read?: When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th
programme.desc: The Headless Cabbie: Wolfgang dares Arnold and the gang to break superstitions, which causes a spate of bad luck to erupt. Friday the 13th: At a sleepover, Arnold and the boys sit around and tell scary stories.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story
programme.desc: Back To School: Grandpa returns to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Egg Story: Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and take care of an egg over the weekend to learn teamwork and responsibility.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar
programme.desc: Weird Cousin: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila, the love of Arnold's life. Baby Oskar: Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families
programme.desc: Helga Sleepwalks: Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. Fighting Families: The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and have selected two families: one from PS 118 and PS 119.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Monkeyman!/Buses, Bikes, Subways
programme.desc: Monkeyman!: Arnold is saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman. Buses, Bikes, Subways: Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grandpa's Sister/Synchronized Swimming
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister: Mitzi arrives unexpectedly at the boarding house. Synchronized Swimming: Coach Wittenberg recruits Arnold's gang for a synchronized swim team.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Jail stays are getting longer and many inmates have very little, leading to violence erupting over any perceived slight, especially if it involves food.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: It's Reagan versus Reagan when Danny goes against Jamie's direct order during a hostage negotiation. Also, Nicky asks Erin for help when her friend is in jeopardy of losing his scholarship because of a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While off duty, Danny encounters a gas station robbery in progress and is forced to use his weapon, leaving him shaken and his family and co-workers concerned.

programme.desc: After a woman is murdered in her apartment, Danny and Baez turn to her daughter, Margo (Lyrica Okano), for help, but instead she complicates the investigation.

programme.desc: After an incident where Officer Witten's (Lauren Patten) backup physically could not keep up with a chase, Frank must decide whether to implement a more rigorous fitness test for the NYPD.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Varias parejas que están en proceso de adoptar niños en Seattle empiezan a ser asesinadas. La UAC busca a un criminal que tiene un perfil muy pronunciado de instinto maternal, aunque asesino. Por otro lado, García tiene miedo de hablar con Kevin.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras el rescate de un pequeño bote con oficiales de la Armada heridos, el equipo se ve obligado a esconderse después de descubrir terroristas a bordo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el cuerpo de un teniente de la marina al que le falta un ojo, llevándoles al mundo de las luchas enjauladas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo investiga la muerte de un cirujano reservista voluntario de los Navy SEALs, se ven obligados a solicitar la ayuda de Kayla (Naomi Grace), la hija de Vance, para llevar a cabo una misión peligrosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank pregunta si un encuentro con activistas comunitarios fue un accidente o una trampa. Jamie se esfuerza por depender menos de la información de Frank para tomar decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que un ex oficial espera a Frank en un restaurante, se siente culpable por las circunstancias que rodearon el despido y trata de reintegrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Varias parejas que están en proceso de adoptar niños en Seattle empiezan a ser asesinadas. La UAC busca a un criminal que tiene un perfil muy pronunciado de instinto maternal, aunque asesino. Por otro lado, García tiene miedo de hablar con Kevin.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: El festín del amor

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.title: La maldición de la llorona
programme.desc: Una joven hereda una mansión, solo para descubrir que está hechizada por brujas y espíritus malignos.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: Jairo es un adolescente que vive en un mundo marginal, en un barrio repleto de drogas y asaltos. Hastiado de la pobreza y de su infierno familiar, se ve obligado a recurrir a la violencia.

programme.title: Por un puñado de dólares

programme.title: Invitación a un pistolero
programme.desc: Cuando el ex soldado confederado Matt Weaver regresa a casa después de la Guerra Civil, se encuentra con que su rancho ha sido vendido al nuevo jefe del municipio, Sam Brewster. Ante la actitud violenta del rebelde,

programme.title: El enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente
programme.desc: Durante la crisis económica de 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), un sicario, es contratado para restablecer el orden después de que tres idiotas roban una partida de póquer protegida por la mafia.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Mátame suavemente
programme.desc: Al rojo vivo, Heather Graham (Boogie Nights) y Joseph Fiennes (Shakespeare in Love) como nunca antes, en esta odisea sexual acerca de los poderes adictivos y mortales de la pasión ilícita. Algo muy bueno puede resultar mortal.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Escobar: paraíso perdido
programme.desc: Nick, un joven surfista, cree que todos sus sueños se han hecho realidad cuando va a Colombia a visitar a su hermano. Nick se enamora perdidamente de la bella María. Todo parece perfecto hasta que Nick conoce al tío de la joven, un tal Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria
programme.desc: Un equipo de fisicoculturistas de Miami llevan una vida de lujo a través del secuestro y de la extorsión en esta comedia policial basada en una historia real.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Una epopeya en expansión sobre la familia, la fe, el poder y el petróleo. La historia narra la vida de Daniel Plainview, quien se transforma a sí mismo de un minero de la plata en un magnate petrolero hecho por cuenta propia.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Colateral: Lugar y tiempo equivocado
programme.desc: Vincent es un asesino a sueldo tranquilo y calculador que está en su mejor momento. Max es un taxista con grandes sueños y sin resultados. Esta noche, Max llevará a Vincent a su próximo trabajo. Una noche, cinco paradas, cinco asesinatos y un escape.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Muerte a Salazar
programme.desc: Un equipo élite de agentes de la DEA y un narcotraficante peligroso esperan la extracción; ¡pero quedan atrapados en una emboscada!

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Azul extremo 2: El arrecife
programme.desc: Una pareja de europeos de clase alta (David Anders y Marsha Thomason) contrata a Sebastian (Chris Carmack), un buceador profesional, y a su novia aspirante a cazatesoros (Laura Vandervoort) para recuperar un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (ESP)
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: la cuna de la vida
programme.desc: Lara Croft viaja por todo el mundo en busca de la legendaria Caja de Pandora. Si Lara fracasa y la caja cae en manos de los criminales Jonathan Reiss y Chen Lo, millones de personas morirán.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: De amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Guerra de papás 2
programme.desc: Dusty (Mark Wahlberg) y Brad (Will Ferrell) creen dominar la coparentalidad… hasta que llegan sus padres y ponen a prueba su alianza en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Algo salvaje
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo conservador accede a viajar con una mujer alocada y excéntrica, que lo embarca en una estrafalaria odisea que trastocará el mundo de ambos.

programme.title: Instinto fatal
programme.desc: Una seductora mujer empuñando un picahielo se lanza, con amor y risa, a una divertida parodia de Carl Reiner, leyenda de la comedia y director de 'The Jerk'. Coprotagonizan Armand Assante, Sherilyn Fenn, Kate Nelligan y Sean Young.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Day of the Dead: Celebration of Life
programme.desc: Each year, the spirits of the dead visit the living in this fascinating look into this famous Mexican tradition.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros
programme.desc: Cuando se desata una epidemia de vampirismo y su familia es asesinada, el joven Martin (Connor Paolo) se vuelve el protegido de un canoso y obstinado cazador (Nick Damici) cuya nueva presa son los muertos vivientes.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate

programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un joven sano muere misteriosamente mientras duerme y las pruebas de toxicología revelan una dosis letal de lidocaína en su sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Boxing: Haney vs Garcia
programme.desc: There is set to be a huge fight in the US on April 20 when Devin Haney and Ryan Garcia go head-to-head for the WBO Super Lightweight championship.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Unbeaten welterweight prospect Raul Curiel (11-0) stepped in the ring with Brad Solomon (29-5).

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: All the boxing action from around the world.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Alexis Rocha (18-1) and Blair Cobbs (15-0-1) hoped to enhance their reputations in the main event in L.A.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Golden Boy Promotions presents a thrilling showdown at super lightweight, as Duarte faces off against Madueno.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Katie Taylor (20-0) sought to defend her undisputed lightweight titles against Amanda Serrano (42-1-1).

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Katie Taylor (20-0) sought to defend her undisputed lightweight titles against Amanda Serrano (42-1-1).

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: All the boxing action.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: British heavyweight prospect Leo Atang looked to extend his unbeaten start in the professional ranks.

programme.title: Mayweather vs. Mosley
programme.desc: In a fight of contrasting styles, Floyd Mayweather Jr. and Shane Mosley clash in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather Jr. was looking to add to his belts against former two-weight champion Robert Guerrero.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather Jr. and Marcos Maidana collided in a rematch billed as Mayhem at the MGM Grand Garden Arena.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Vergil Ortiz Jr. defends his WBO International Welterweight Title against Egidijus Kavaliauskas.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Oscar Collazo attempts to retain his WBO world strawweight title as he fights Gerardo Zapata.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Ramirez locked horns with Billam-Smith in Riyadh; with the two belts at stake, who would unify the division.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Undisputed lightweight champion Katie Taylor clashes with Firuza Sharipova in Liverpool.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Terrorism is suspected when a woman's truck explodes outside of the daycare center where she works.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man uses a dating site to meet and murder a college student.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police investigate the shooting death of a man who was in bed with his wife, they discover a complex case with two suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police begin to doubt a man's claim that his wife was murdered by a friend.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A similar abduction in New Mexico helps crack the case of a 19-year-old missing college student in Oregon.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police link a filmmaker who is obsessed with the show "Dexter" with a man's disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Michael Peterson, who was granted a new trial after the 2003 conviction in the murder of his wife was overturned, discusses the case and his decision to enter an Alford plea.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Terrorism is suspected when a woman's truck explodes outside of the daycare center where she works.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man uses a dating site to meet and murder a college student.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives connect a series of seemingly random crimes to crack the case of a missing young man.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old woman goes missing from a shopping mall in Plano, Texas, her family searches for her, and the police seek out who is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a successful young doctor collapses, a blood test reveals cyanide poisoning, resulting in a criminal investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of Spokane, Wash., businessman exposes a web of malevolence extending from the Pacific Northwest to a North Dakota oil field.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Brittany Stork's decades-long quest to find out more about her mother's mysterious death leads to a dramatic courtroom decision; the man at the center of the case tells his side of the story.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time
programme.desc: Bret Michaels, lead singer of rock band Poison, welcomes 25 young ladies to his rocker lair in the hopes of finding that one special girl he can call his own.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Talk Dirty to Me
programme.desc: With 16 girls all fighting for Bret's affection, tensions are run high and alliances are formed as the ladies try to eliminate each other from the competition for Bret's heart, it's “Good Girls” versus “Bad Girls”.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Motocross
programme.desc: Bret challenges the twelve remaining girls to put the pedal to the metal in a motocross relay race, as they learn to ride, they fall, nearly run people over, and even lose an acrylic nail or two.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Riff it Good
programme.desc: Bret wants a woman with a creative side, so he splits the remaining 10 women in teams of 2 for a music challenge, where the girls write lyrics to one of Bret's tracks then perform the song on stage.

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.desc: Jackie discovers her father is listed as "unknown" on her birth certificate. Alexis buys the company planning to publish Caress' book. Fighting for his empire, Blake must endure the devastating lies of the one woman bent on his destruction -- Alexis.

programme.desc: Blake's hopes for victory are crushed by a drunken witness; Bart is dropped as a senatorial candidate; the woman who can clear Blake's name is forced to conceal her identity.

programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.desc: Monica must figure out how to stop the generational link of hate and violence that is destroying a family,

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica takes a job as a teacher’s aide in order to help a man who, after teaching for 20 years, feels that he has had no positive impact on his students’ lives

programme.title: Merantau

programme.desc: A corrupt businessman commits a murder and the only witness is the girlfriend of another businessman with close connections to the Chinese government.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.desc: Huellas dactilares: el Departamento de Identificación del FBI confía en las huellas digitales como una de las formas más eficaces para identificar a los delincuentes.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Es difícil condenar a un asesino sin encontrar el cuerpo. Pero la ciencia forense puede encontrar maneras de hacerlo. Los asesinos astutos pueden deshacerse de los restos de sus víctimas, pero a menudo no son rivales para investigadores creativos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Anchorage, Alaska, una madre joven y sus dos hijas fueron violadas y brutalmente asesinadas. Solo había una pieza de evidencia forense: una toalla con ladillas que el asesino usó para limpiarse después del crimen.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1984, el sur de Miami se convirtió en el hogar de un asesino en serie sádico. Haciéndose pasar por un fotógrafo de modas, Cristopher Wilder atraía a mujeres jóvenes que iban de compras con la promesa de fama y fortuna. La mayoría terminaron muertas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los estragos de un asesino en serie fueron descubiertos cuando los cuerpos de varias mujeres jóvenes comenzaron a aparecer en tumbas poco profundas que salpicaron el ambiente silvestre de Alaska.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Los oficiales detienen a un hombre problemático con antecedentes de fastidiar a la gente en la calle. Los agentes detienen a un sospechoso con dinero en su zapato. La policía trata de descifrar la historia detrás de un disturbio doméstico.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre en una bicicleta decide huir de los oficiales tras estar bebiendo en la calle. Una mujer no está segura de cómo terminó en un vehículo robado. Descubren a una pareja fumando metanfetamina en frente de un niño en un vehículo sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta huir de la policía porque no ha pagado manutención, pero termina detenido por otras razones. Una mujer llena de ira casi atropella a su novia. Un sospechoso trata de ocultar algo a los oficiales, pero sus nervios lo delatan.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre furioso y sin control ruega que le disparen. Una mujer borracha se enoja después de ser arrestada por agresión doméstica. Agentes tratan de entender la historia detrás de una disputa en una familia disfuncional.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un intruso en propiedad privada armado, usa a un cachorro como escudo. Una mujer drogada hace un escándalo, dañando casas y gente. Una señora amante de los gatos reporta a sus vecinos por ruidosos.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Se atrapa a un sospechoso que intenta huir escondiéndose en un lugar obvio. Él dispara cuando cree que su perro corre peligro. Le llaman a paramédicos para una mujer angustiada y su pareja catatónica.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer llora cuando es detenida por la policía. Durante una parada sospechosa, un pasajero nervioso ayuda a los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a un extraño por lo que hay en su billetera.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre al volante de un auto robado causa una loca persecución. La mamá de dos hombres llama a la policía cuando uno amenaza al otro con un cuchillo. Una pareja joven se contradice con la policía.

programme.title: Asesinatos en cruceros
programme.desc: Una hábil jugadora de póker arrasa en las mesas una vez en alta mar. Pero después es testigo de un hombre que cae por la borda, muchos empiezan a preguntarse si fue accidental o intencional. ¿Y quién será el siguiente?

programme.title: Asesinatos en cruceros

programme.title: Asesinatos en cruceros
programme.desc: Una escritora de moda aborda un crucero de Londres a Nueva York, pero termina obteniendo más de lo que esperaba. ¿Quién la mató? ¿Alguien a bordo sabe lo que sucedió?

programme.title: Asesinatos en cruceros
programme.desc: Una adinerada socialité de San Francisco es asesinada en el mar, golpeada hasta la muerte con una botella de whisky. ¿Podría su mayordomo, que también se alojaba en su habitación, tener alguna pista para resolver este asesinato?

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Giant robots work factory floors and outer space; floating fortresses house 6,000 military personnel with length matching Empire State Building's height; diesel engines produce 108,000 horsepower in audacious engineering feats worldwide.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: Come take a trip across the incredible Mackinac Bridge, and discover why it's one of the world's most amazing construction projects.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Big machines span NASA's world's biggest wind tunnel and flight simulator, Joy Mining's Continuous Miner underground machine, London Eye's 443-foot observation wheel, IMAX's largest film technology, and Claas Cougar world's biggest lawnmower.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Stories of those who believed in dreams and defied the commonplace with their extraordinary creations; covering some of the world's architectural and engineering structures, scientific inventions, and social wonders.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A jet truck that can travel 300 mph; the Baltimore Technical Assistance Response Unit's mobile command truck; a garbage truck with an articulated arm; how SWAT, bomb squad, HAZMAT, and crime scene specialty trucks are built.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strength measurement explores why some things are stronger than others; examine rope, tractor, diamond, tugboat, and plastic strength from Spectra fiber to Lexan, discovering where, how, and why strength matters in daily life applications.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: What does it take to rate as "the world's strongest"? Watch as life-saving boron carbide body armor, strong enough to stop 9mm machine gun bullets at point-blank range, is put to the test.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: Henry Danger

programme.title: Henry Danger

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La nave espacial en la que estaban Perro y Gato cae en un lago congelado donde un monstro del lago termina comiéndoselos como a un bocadillo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Una vez en el pueblo de Perros y Gatos, CatDog logran que todos los perros y gatos de la ciudad se enfrenten los unos a otros. Comienza una batalla en la cual Perro y Gato intentan interferir pero nada sale como lo esperaban.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hace un año desde que el álter ego del súper héroe Perro el Poderoso salvó al Alcalde Rancio el Conejo de la Parca y ahora Nearburg está celebrando. / Los sobrinos de Tito vienen de visita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Este es el cuento de un viejo pescador sobre el pez espada que cuelga de la pared del living de Perro y Gato. / Gato sufre una crisis de identidad cuando una banda de gatos bohemios abre una tienda cerca de la casa de Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Desde que era un cachorro, Perro siempre persiguió al camión de la basura, conocido como el viejo 159. / Perro tiene que ponerse un cono sobre su cabeza para protegerse de las picaduras de garrapatas en la oreja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre hermanos se descontrola cuando Papá y Mamá vienen a visitar a Perro y Gato. / Perro realmente tiene un problema cuando descubre que su fuente de alimentación preferida proviene de animales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que le quitaran su disco volador. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras los perros grasos están preparando una trampa para CatDog, una ardilla accidentalmente se pega a la espalda de Cliff. /Debido a la escasez de fondos, CatDog opta por no intercambiar regalos en el “Día del hermano” este año.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cuando Perro desobedece las normas de la piscina de la comunidad, él y Gato son arrestados por el guardavidas y los llevan a prisión. / Gato se ve consumido al coleccionar figuras. A medida que su colección crece las figuras le hablan.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: ¿Es el final de Gato y Perro? Cansados de ser un dos cabezas, Gato decide hacerse una cirugía para separarse de Perro. / Perro y Gato una vez más corren por sus vidas de los Perros Grasosos hacia la seguridad de su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La amiga sueca de Cat, Ingrid, viene a visitarlo. Sin embargo, esto podría ser un problema, una vez que haya ocultado la verdad acerca de CatDog. El nuevo cartero llega y le entrega las cartas antes de que Dog pueda perseguirlo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que solo tiene una vida a diferencia de las nueve vidas de Gato, Perro se pone obsesivo con la seguridad. /Cansado de los modos paternales de Gato, Perro se escapa de la casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Aparecen nuevos vecinos extraños en la casa de enfrente y Perro, obsesionado con los cómics de ciencia ficción, cree que son alienígenas. / Luego de estar despiertos toda la noche, Perro se queda dormido en el día durante una entrevista.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo monta un show de talentos en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja le enseña a Plankton qué es la diversión.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
